title: Panel Structured Output
description: Required structured emission appended to every panel review. Panels continue emitting Markdown reasoning but must append this JSON block. Execution fails if the structured block is missing.

panel_name.description: Identifier matching the panel filename without extension (e.g., 'code-review', 'security-review').

panel_version.description: Semantic version of the panel definition used for this execution.

confidence_score.description: Aggregate confidence in the panel's assessment. 0.0 = no confidence, 1.0 = full confidence.

risk_level.description: Assessed risk level for the reviewed change.

compliance_score.description: Degree of compliance with applicable policies. 0.0 = non-compliant, 1.0 = fully compliant.

policy_flags.description: Policy violation or concern flags raised during review.

auto_remediable.description: Whether this flag can be resolved without human intervention.

requires_human_review.description: Whether the panel recommends human review before merge.

findings.description: Individual findings from each persona in the panel.

confidence.description: This persona's confidence in their verdict.

rationale.description: Brief rationale for the verdict. Must not be empty.

evidence.description: Grounding evidence linking this finding to a specific code location. Findings with severity 'medium' or above that lack evidence may be treated as hallucinated and discarded.

file.description: File path where the finding was identified

execution_status.description: Status of the panel execution. Defaults to 'success' if omitted (backward compatible).

aggregate_verdict.description: Computed aggregate verdict based on individual persona verdicts and policy weighting.

execution_context.description: Contextual metadata about the panel execution environment.

model_version.description: Model identifier (e.g., 'gpt-4-turbo-2024-04-09', 'claude-3-opus'). Free-form string — no format constraint, as model naming conventions vary by provider.

data_classification.description: Optional classification of the emission's data sensitivity. Helps identify emissions that may contain sensitive content requiring redaction or access controls.

level.description: Data sensitivity level of this emission's content.

contains_sensitive_evidence.description: Whether findings contain sensitive evidence (credentials, PII, vulnerability details).

redaction_applied.description: Whether sensitive content has been redacted from this emission.

execution_trace.description: Evidence of actual code evaluation during panel review. Records which files the LLM read and which specific code sections it analyzed, linking findings to concrete code locations.

files_read.description: File paths the panel agent read during review.

analysis_duration_ms.description: Approximate time spent on analysis in milliseconds.

grounding_references.description: Links findings to specific code locations.
